text:
# Demo Agenda  
Nationwide - IBM Gen AI Demo 2025  
1. Overview of Gen AI in Nationwide
2. Gen AI in Development Productivity – Digital
3. GenAIinMigrationProductivity– Teradata to Databricks
4. Gen AI solutions in AI COE – Sample
5. Quality Assurance Assistant
6. Complaints Letter Generation
7. Confluence RAG  
logo
name: Chunk 3/14

raw_entities.name: Nationwide
raw_entities.description: A major US-based financial services and insurance organization serving as the primary client for the Gen AI demonstration and solution deployment.
context: Overview of Gen AI in Nationwide

raw_entities.name: IBM
raw_entities.description: The technology and consulting vendor delivering the generative AI solutions, AI COE framework, and demonstration agenda to the client.

raw_entities.name: Gen AI Demo 2025
raw_entities.description: A scheduled demonstration event outlining the deployment and application of generative AI solutions across the client's digital, migration, and operational workflows.

raw_entities.name: Quality Assurance Assistant
raw_entities.description: A specialized AI-powered application designed to support and automate quality assurance processes within the client's development or operational workflows.

raw_entities.name: Complaints Letter Generation
raw_entities.description: An AI-driven tool or workflow designed to automate the drafting and formatting of customer complaint correspondence, improving communication speed and accuracy.

raw_entities.name: Development Productivity
raw_entities.description: The application of Gen AI to enhance software development workflows, reduce manual effort, and accelerate delivery cycles within the client's digital operations.
context: Gen AI in Development Productivity – Digital

raw_entities.name: Migration Productivity
raw_entities.description: The use of AI-driven tools to streamline and accelerate the migration process from legacy Teradata systems to modern Databricks infrastructure.

raw_entities.name: Teradata
raw_entities.description: A legacy or existing data warehousing platform that serves as the source system for the client's data migration initiative.

raw_entities.name: Databricks
raw_entities.description: A modern data and AI platform serving as the target destination for the client's data migration and Gen AI solution deployment.

raw_entities.name: Confluence
raw_entities.description: A collaborative workspace and knowledge management platform utilized by the client, integrated with RAG capabilities for the demonstration.

raw_entities.name: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)
raw_entities.description: A technical capability that enhances AI model outputs by retrieving relevant context from external knowledge bases before generating responses, applied here to Confluence data.

raw_entities.name: AI COE
raw_entities.description: The client's internal Center of Excellence responsible for governing, developing, and deploying AI solutions and frameworks, serving as the focal point for the demo.
context: Gen AI solutions in AI COE – Sample

raw_entities.name: Productivity Gain
raw_entities.description: The quantified or qualified outcome of reduced manual effort and accelerated workflows achieved through Gen AI integration in development and migration processes.
context: Gen AI in Development Productivity – Digital

properties.what_it_does: enhances AI generation with retrieved context

relationships.description: The demo event is conducted for and involves the client Nationwide.
IBM is the presenting organization for the Gen AI Demo event.
The development productivity use case directly addresses Nationwide's operational needs.
relationships.context: Gen AI in Development Productivity – Digital

relationships.description: The migration productivity use case targets Nationwide's data infrastructure modernization.
Teradata is the legacy technology being migrated to Databricks.
The Quality Assurance Assistant solution is showcased during the demo event.
The Complaints Letter Generation solution is showcased during the demo event.
Confluence leverages RAG capabilities to enhance knowledge retrieval.
The QA Assistant directly supports development productivity workflows.
The letter generation tool streamlines migration-related communication tasks.
Development productivity use cases yield measurable productivity gains.
relationships.context: 2. Gen AI in Development Productivity – Digital

relationships.description: Migration productivity use cases yield measurable productivity gains.
The AI Center of Excellence develops and distributes the QA Assistant solution.
relationships.context: 4. Gen AI solutions in AI COE – Sample

relationships.description: The AI Center of Excellence develops and distributes the Complaints Letter Generation solution.
relationships.context: 4. Gen AI solutions in AI COE – Sample

relationships.description: Nationwide expects to realize productivity gains from the implemented Gen AI solutions.
relationships.context: 1. Overview of Gen AI in Nationwide

relationships.description: The QA Assistant is powered by RAG capabilities for accurate information retrieval.
The letter generation tool relies on RAG to fetch relevant context for drafting.
